name: Public Joint Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of Siberia
summary: Public Joint-Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of Siberia, together with its subsidiaries, transmits and distributes electricity for power grids in Russia. It also provides services for technological connection of consumers to the network. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Krasnoyarsk, Russia. Public Joint-Stock Company Interregional Distribution Grid Company of Siberia is a subsidiary of PJSC Russian Grids.
